campaign.title: Investimento em Decoração: Artesanal no Home Office

briefing.interpretation: This campaign positions the amigurumi as a premium decorative asset that bridges the gap between professional productivity and artisanal comfort. The strategy focuses on showcasing the product as a sophisticated 'investment' piece for modern home office aesthetics to drive high-intent traffic to the blog.
briefing.identifiedProduct: A high quality artisanal marketing product (handcrafted amigurumi toy).
briefing.visualDirection: The 'criativo' style will be expressed through an artistic juxtaposition of corporate tech elements like tablets or keyboards with the soft, organic textures of yarn and crochet tools.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Main header image showcasing the product as a professional desk companion.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Stunning horizontal header photography of the exact A high quality artisanal marketing product, centered on a light-colored wooden desk next to a sleek laptop and a designer coffee mug, reflecting 'Investimento em Decoração: Artesanal no Home Office', soft natural lighting, high resolution, professional product shot.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Macro-focused shots highlighting texture and craftsmanship details.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Professional toy photography of the exact A high quality artisanal marketing product, placed next to a blank elegant pricing tag on a tidy workstation, high quality yarn texture, soft studio lighting, macro lens, 8k, pastel bokeh background.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Vertical framing capturing the product within an aspirational workspace lifestyle.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Dynamic vertical shot of the exact A high quality artisanal marketing product being held by gentle hands over a organized home office desk, vibrant colors, soft lighting, depth of field, 8k, professional interior design aesthetic.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Wider shot emphasizing the cozy atmosphere of a decorated home office.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Professional wide shot of the exact A high quality artisanal marketing product sitting on a floating shelf above a creative workspace, surrounded by art books and yarn, clean shadows, soft studio lighting, high resolution.

channelRecommendations.recommendation: Clean, sophisticated composition emphasizing workplace wellness and high-end decor.
channelRecommendations.prompt: Sophisticated photography of the exact A high quality artisanal marketing product on a minimalist white desk, symbolizing artisanal investment in professional environments, high-end finish, soft pastel bokeh background, professional studio lighting.
